creator: sheldonh@starjuice.net
text:
On Wed, 05 Sep 2001 13:23:04 +0300, Peter Pentchev wrote:

> >  I agree.  I think the major MTAs should be on the first CD, along with
> >  Apache (and probably apache-ssl too).
> 
> There's a little problem with that: we do not package qmail because
> of the weird DJB license or maybe the lack thereof.

*shrug*  Exim and Postfix, then.  I'm only lobbying for Exim, though.

Ciao,
Sheldon.
